recommendations.title: Requirements to Be a Normal Person

recommendations.title: Belladonna of Sadness
recommendations.overview: An evil feudal lord rapes a village girl on her wedding night and proceeds to ruin her and her husband's lives. After she's eventually banished from her village, the girl makes a pact with the devil to gain magical ability and take revenge.

recommendations.title: Burning Sands
recommendations.overview: Deep into Hell Week, a favored pledgee is torn between honoring his code of silence or standing up against the intensifying violence of underground hazing.

recommendations.title: Arif V 216

recommendations.title: Idle Hands

recommendations.title: Spawn
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Fantasy, Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller

recommendations.title: Coraline
recommendations.overview: Wandering her rambling old house in her boring new town, 11-year-old Coraline discovers a hidden door to a strangely idealized version of her life. In order to stay in the fantasy, she must make a frighteningly real sacrifice.
